title: sagraea woodsii
intro: Sagraea woodsii, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The medicinal properties of Sagraea woodsii include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sagraea woodsii can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its therapeutic benefits.
